title: Exception should not be caught
description: "Exception" should not be caughtAnalyze your codeintentionality-completemaintainabilityCode Smellcweerror-handlingWhy is this an issue?More InfoCatchingSystem.Exceptionseems like an efficient way to handle multiple possible exceptions. Unfortunately, it traps all exception types, including the ones that were not intended to be caught. To prevent any misunderstandings, exception filters should be used.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.detection_conditions: catch block catching generic Exception type without rethrowing or exception filters
logic.triggering_conditions: catch (Exception) without 'when' filter AND without 'throw;' in catch body
logic.exclusion_conditions: Exclude catch with 'when' filters, catch blocks that rethrow, specific exception types, test code
logic.reasoning: Catching System.Exception is too broad and traps all exception types, including unexpected ones. Best practice is to catch specific exception types. However, catching Exception IS acceptable with: (1) Exception filters (when clause), or (2) Rethrowing (throw;). The rule detects 'catch (Exception' or 'catch(Exception' patterns, excluding cases with 'when' keyword or 'throw;' statement. Scanner extracts TryStatement nodes containing catch blocks.

should_not_trigger: try { } catch (Exception ex) when (ex is ArgumentException) { }
